DiscrepancyNoteAction.Message: Temperature outside plausible range for selected unit - please verify
Subject age below protocol eligibility criteria - please verify

RuleDef.Name: EC02 VS TEMP RANGE CHECK
RuleDef.Description: Flags TEMP values outside plausible range for the selected unit
RuleDef.Expression: (I_VITAL_VSTEMPU eq "C" and (I_VITAL_VSTEMP lt 34 or I_VITAL_VSTEMP gt 42)) or (I_VITAL_VSTEMPU eq "F" and (I_VITAL_VSTEMP lt 93.2 or I_VITAL_VSTEMP gt 107.6))

RuleDef.Name: EC03 AGE ELIGIBILITY CHECK
RuleDef.Description: Flags subjects below minimum protocol eligibility age at screening
